provisions.content:
(INDICES USED AS BENCHMARKS IN FINANCIAL
INSTRUMENTS AND FINANCIAL CONTRACTS OR TO
MEASURE THE PERFORMANCE OF INVESTMENT FUNDS)

[ L.S.330.10

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.10
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (INDICES USED AS
BENCHMARKS IN FINANCIAL INSTRUMENTS
AND FINANCIAL CONTRACTS OR TO MEASURE
THE PERFORMANCE OF INVESTMENT FUNDS)
7 ta’ Marzu, 2017
AVVIŻ LEGALI 77 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 185 tal-2018,
312 tal-2022 u 6 tal-2026.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
